_comment: Static config. Do NOT register these tasks until Eva validation week clears (~2026-05-03). After that, ask Cowork to register via the scheduled-tasks MCP.

tasks.name: Process-Tools — Night Auditor
tasks.prompt: You are the Night Auditor for the project at C:\Users\erics\Documents\GitHub\Process-Tools. Read CLAUDE.md, STATE.md, JOURNAL.md. Follow roles/night-auditor.md exactly. READ-ONLY.

tasks.name: Process-Tools — Researcher
tasks.prompt: You are the Researcher for the project at C:\Users\erics\Documents\GitHub\Process-Tools. Read CLAUDE.md, STATE.md, NEEDS-INPUT.md, QUEUE.md. Follow roles/researcher.md exactly. Investigate ONE bounded question; write findings to research/.

tasks.name: Process-Tools — Planner
tasks.prompt: You are the Planner for the project at C:\Users\erics\Documents\GitHub\Process-Tools. Read CLAUDE.md, JOURNAL.md, NEEDS-INPUT.md, PROPOSED.md, QUEUE.md, DONE.md. Follow roles/planner.md exactly. Update STATE.md and curate QUEUE.md.
